overview.heading: What is Vault Radar?
overview.body: Vault Radar lets platform teams define golden patterns and workflows for developers to manage applications at scale.

get_started.heading: Getting Started
get_started.body: Learn how to get started with Vault Radar.

cards.heading: Templates
cards.body: Learn about templates and how to use them to create projects from a reusable configuration.

cards.heading: Add-ons
cards.body: Learn about add-ons and how to use them to add additional functionality to your applications.

cards.heading: Role-based access control
cards.body: Learn how to control access to Vault Radar functionality with user roles.

cards.heading: Managing templates
cards.body: Learn how to create and manage templates in Vault Radar.

cards.heading: Managing add-ons
cards.body: Learn how to create and manage add-ons in Vault Radar.

cards.heading: Using templates
cards.body: Learn how to create projects from templates.

cards.heading: Using add-ons
cards.body: Learn how to install add-ons to Vault Radar projects.
